focus: final closing pass -- phase 006 completion-claim empirical spot-check + registry consistency check

findingDetails.title: Findings registry drops claim-adjudication fields for active findings
findingDetails.claim: The findings registry cannot satisfy the final-pass claim-adjudication contract because openFindings entries omit claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, and downgradeTrigger for all 16 active findings.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Searched the registry for required field names and parsed registry openFindings plus state-log findingDetails. P1 state-log details retain adjudication fields, but registry openFindings do not; three P2 state-log details also lack the full field set.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The reducer may intentionally keep the registry shallow and rely on JSONL state records for full adjudication, but this iteration explicitly requested registry consistency for all active findings before synthesis.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 or close if the reducer contract is clarified that the registry is intentionally shallow and synthesis always joins against deep-review-state.jsonl, or if active registry entries are enriched before synthesis.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Parsed all 16 active registry entries and all were missing the seven requested fields; parsed state-log details to distinguish registry projection loss from original finding-detail absence.
findingDetails.recommendation: Before synthesis, enrich active registry entries with claim-adjudication fields or make the synthesis join against state-log findingDetails explicit and validated.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: final closing pass over non-trivial phase docs, plugin continuation hook, and active findings registry before synthesis

targetSelection.selectionReason: prompt-named final closing pass targets for phase 006 completion-claim consistency and registry consistency

searchLedger.hypothesis: Phase 006 may claim complete while live idle behavior remains unverified.

searchActions.result: Complete status is paired with explicit live idle-smoke limitation and next safe action; no hidden overclaim found.

searchLedger.rationale: The docs accurately distinguish implemented/unit-tested work from live runtime smoke validation.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Verified by direct read of completion, risk, task, and limitation sections.

searchLedger.invariant: Active findings used for synthesis should retain or be joinable to claim-adjudication fields.

searchActions.result: All 16 registry openFindings are missing all seven fields.

searchLedger.rationale: Registry projection is too shallow to satisfy the final-pass claim-adjudication check.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Some active findings may duplicate each other and should be merged.

searchActions.result: Related clusters found, but each related item covers a distinct surface: command docs, overlay docs, regression coverage, RICCE implementation/test coverage, and graph metadata/test coverage.

searchLedger.rationale: Related clusters should be noted in synthesis, but no same-surface duplicate requires merge.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: IDs cover different producer/consumer or validation surfaces.

searchLedger.invariant: Final pass must not inspect or mutate excluded phase 009.

searchActions.result: No phase 009 files read or modified.

searchLedger.rationale: This iteration stayed within phases 001-008 and review artifacts.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Tool calls did not target the excluded path.

title: Findings registry drops claim-adjudication fields for active findings

reason: Phase 006 docs explicitly preserve live idle smoke as unverified while claiming implementation/unit/spec work complete.
Related clusters exist, but reviewed findings cover distinct surfaces and should be cross-referenced rather than merged.
